# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def convert
    file = params[:file]
    desired_format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    if file.present? && desired_format.present?
      output_file_path = "public/#{SecureRandom.hex}.#{desired_format}"
      system("convert", file.tempfile.path, "-resize", size, output_file_path)
      
      if $?.success?
        render json: { message: "Conversion successful", url: Rails.application.routes.url_helpers.image_url(output_file_path) }
      else
        render json: { error: "Conversion failed" }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      end
    else
      render json: { error: "Missing file or format parameter" }, status: :bad_request
    end
  end
end
